title: tunica ochroleuca
intro: Tunica ochroleuca, also known as the golden jelly lichen, is a type of lichen that belongs to the family Collematidae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiviral, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of tunica ochroleuca include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or tea, and it can also be used in herbal supplements to support overall health and well-being.
